```json
  "findings": [
    "Confined space entry permit expired mid-shift while work is actively in progress",
    "Entry without a valid permit violates the permit-required confined space program",
    "Atmospheric hazards, engulfment, or other confined space risks are uncontrolled without current permit",
    "Continuous monitoring and rescue readiness tied to the active permit are no longer valid"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop all confined space work immediately and evacuate entrants",
    "Reassess the space and atmospheric conditions before re-entry",
    "Issue a new or renewed confined space entry permit",
    "Verify rescue services, ventilation, monitoring equipment, and attendant duties are in place",
    "Brief all affected personnel on the new permit and hazards before resuming work"
  ],
  "rationale": "OSHA 1910.146 requires a valid entry permit for the duration of permit-required confined space work. An expired permit means the entry is no longer authorized, continuous monitoring and rescue provisions are no longer assured, and continuing work creates a critical, non-compliant condition. Work must stop until a new permit is issued and conditions are re-verified.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA 1910.146"
  ]
}
```
